info.title: CollisionSpike EVA Sentry
info.description: Custom connector over the EVA Sentry REST submission Azure Function. The Function owns the EVA token lifecycle SERVER-SIDE: it mints/caches the 5-minute /Connect/token JWT (Client_Id/Client_Secret from Key Vault refs) and attaches Authorization: Bearer to POST /Instruction/Inspection. This connector is KEYED (x-functions-key) only — it has NO OAuth security definition, because Power Platform custom connectors do not support the OAuth2 client-credentials grant (Microsoft Learn). Only invoked when the EVA_API_ENABLED Dataverse gate is true; the JSON drag-drop export is the M1 path + permanent fallback. EVA test/prod credentials are injected by the operator ([RESERVED-FOR-USER]).

post.description: Submits a case to EVA via the Sentry REST /Instruction/Inspection endpoint. The body carries the schema-valid 12-field core (object or JSON string — byte-identical to the drag-drop body for those 12) plus optional ordered base-64 Impact Images (2 previews first, then the full sequence incl. those two again). The Function validates the 12-field core before minting a token. Returns submitted=false with a warning (not an error) on a soft EVA/auth failure so the flow can fall back to drag-drop; returns 400 only on a malformed/invalid payload.

200.description: Submission result (submitted true on accept; false + warnings on a soft failure).

400.description: Malformed request or invalid 12-field core (never contacted EVA).

evaPayload12.description: The settled 12-field EVA core, as the canonical JSON string (the same serializer the Code App + flow emit). May also be passed as an object; the Function coerces. vrm/reference are NOT part of this.

payloadHash.description: Idempotency correlation key. The flow's cr1bd_finalizedpayloadhash latch is the primary guard; the Function echoes this back. Optional.

casePo.description: Lowercase Case/PO (EVA uses lowercase; Box uses UPPERCASE, handled by the flow). Optional.

images.description: Ordered base-64 Impact Image entries. The Function re-orders to: 2 previews first, then the full sequence including those two again. NOTE: the exact EVA Impact-Image field shape is confirmed against the EVA test server before go-live (plan open Q1).

sequenceIndex.description: EVA upload order (ascending). Previews are seeded at 0 and 1.

submitted.description: True when EVA accepted the Instruction. False on a soft EVA/auth failure or when EVA_API_ENABLED is false (use the drag-drop fallback).

evaRef.description: EVA's acknowledgement reference, when returned (field name confirmed against the test server).

payloadHash.description: Echoed idempotency correlation key, when supplied.

warnings.description: Human-readable advisories (e.g. gate off, EVA failure, validation gaps).

apiKeyHeader.name: x-functions-key
apiKeyHeader.description: Azure Functions host/function key. Stored as a connection secret in Power Platform, never in this spec. EVA's own OAuth is handled INSIDE the Function (Key Vault refs) — there is intentionally no OAuth security definition here.
